title: snpArcher Sample Sheet
description: Schema for snpArcher v2 sample sheet validation

sample_id.description: Sample identifier. Used as sample name in final VCF and output files. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens.

input_type.description: Type of input data. Currently supported: fastq, srr. Future: bam, gvcf.

input.description: Input path(s) or SRR accession. For paired-end FASTQ, use semicolon separator: /path/to/r1.fq.gz;/path/to/r2.fq.gz

library_id.description: Library identifier for duplicate marking. Required when a sample_id appears on multiple rows. Defaults to sample_id if not specified.
